stages.validation_rule: Detection alone cannot create an order.

stages.description: Candidate is added to static non-position watchlist.
stages.validation_rule: Watchlist status is not position status.

stages.description: External listing/quote context must be verified before user action.
stages.validation_rule: Verification does not permit system execution.

stages.description: A real executable quote is required before any manual user order.
stages.validation_rule: Indicative, broker valuation, or external prices are not executable quotes.

stages.description: Candidate must pass rule review before becoming a position.
Any order must be manually placed by the user outside TWOS.
stages.validation_rule: TWOS must not place, stage, or trigger orders.

stages.description: If the user executes outside TWOS, later screenshots must reconcile the result.
stages.validation_rule: Only confirmed execution evidence can update position state.

stages.description: Checkpoint promotion requires confirmed execution and post-execution account state.
